name: Easy Teriyaki Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove wing tips from chicken and cut apart at joint.
2. Combine remaining ingredients in a shallow dish.
3. Place marinated chicken wings in an oven-safe baking dish, turning occasionally to coat evenly.
4. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Arrange the chicken wings on a rack in an aluminum foil-lined shallow baking pan.
6. Bake for 40-45 minutes, basting occasionally with the marinade.
